block_02: Every four years, American citizens elect the U.S. president, while investors all over the world try to figure out how the outcome will affect their portfolios.
block_03: The US elections 2020 will take place in less than a week, on November 3. In this newsletter we’ll analyze the upcoming elections with a focus on top trading opportunities it might bring in the case of a victory for each of the candidates. Below is a comparative table of this year nominees, Donald J. Trump and Joe Biden, and their key initiatives.

block_07: Rolled back limits on carbon dioxide emissions from power plants and vehicles
block_08: Most recently, approved oil and gas drilling in Alaska
block_09: Imposed tariffs on goods from European Union
block_10: Strong and tough foreign policy against China
